prestazioni: Lamborghini-sourced 5.2L FSI V10 (CEXA/CXWB) with a custom Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ ECU reflash, targeting 680 HP and 500 lb-ft torque via optimized camshaft timing, direct port methanol injection (Aquamist HFS-5), and a secondary fuel pump (Walbro 450 LPH) for sustained high-RPM fueling

Full titanium Akrapović Evolution exhaust system with 3.5-inch carbon-fiber tips, 200-cell catalytic converters, and a bypass valve delete for unrestricted flow, paired with a custom X-Pipe merge collector (Supersprint) to enhance V10 exhaust scavenging

KW Suspensions Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilovers with remote reservoirs, custom valving for Spyder-specific weight distribution (1,720 kg curb weight), and spherical bearing top mounts (Tractive Suspension) to eliminate compliance under hard cornering, alongside a 20mm front and 15mm rear H&R lowering kit
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Spyder-specific) with carbon-fiber overfenders, custom front splitter with integrated canards (Vorsteiner), and a ducktail spoiler (AWE Tuning) to reduce rear lift at 180+ mph while maintaining convertible functionality
OEM+ Audi Sport carbon-fiber side blades (painted Nardo Gray) with laser-etched R8 Spyder script, paired with custom LED door projectors (VLand) that display the CEXA engine code upon unlocking

Full carbon-fiber engine bay dress-up (VMR) including a custom intake manifold cover (painted in Audi Nardo Gray), carbon-fiber radiator shroud, and a billet aluminum oil cap (Billetworkz) engraved with the V10 firing order (1-6-5-10-2-7-3-8-4-9)
